item.title: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd Faces Sharp Correction Amidst Weak Financials and Market Pressure
item.description: Tata Motors Passenger Vehicles Ltd has experienced a significant correction, falling 35.53% from its peak levels amid deteriorating financial performance and broader market challenges. The stock’s underperformance relative to the Sensex and its peers has raised concerns among investors, prompting a downgrade to a Sell rating by MarketsMOJO. Time: 2 minutes ago

item.title: Bosch Ltd. Rallies 3.12% Amidst Market Weakness — Signs of Recovery or Temporary Bounce?
item.description: While the Sensex declined sharply by 1.84% on 2 Apr 2026, Bosch Ltd. bucked the trend with a 3.12% gain, outperforming its sector by nearly 4 percentage points. This strong intraday performance stands out as a notable event in a broadly weak market environment. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Starcom Information Technology Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 47.52 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: A sharp decline in Starcom Information Technology Ltd has dragged the stock to a fresh 52-week low of Rs 47.52 on 2 Apr 2026, marking a significant 58.17% drop over the past year. This downturn comes amid a broader market weakness, but the stock’s underperformance far exceeds that of the Sensex, which has declined by just 6.27% over the same period. Time: 19 minutes ago

item.title: Inter Globe Finance Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low of Rs 45.6 as Sell-Off Deepens
item.description: Inter Globe Finance Ltd’s stock price declined to a fresh 52-week low of Rs.45.6 on 2 April 2026, marking a significant downturn amid ongoing financial pressures and broader market weakness. The stock’s performance continues to reflect challenges in profitability and valuation concerns within the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Kalind Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 99.35
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Kalind Ltd reached a fresh 52-week high of Rs 99.35 on 2 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable ascent from its 52-week low of Rs 6.76. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum that sets the stock apart from its sector peers and the broader market. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Axis Bank Ltd. Hits Intraday Low Amid Price Pressure on 2 April 2026
item.description: Axis Bank Ltd. experienced a notable decline on 2 Apr 2026, touching an intraday low of Rs 1,153.95, reflecting a 3.26% drop as the stock underperformed its sector and broader market amid persistent downward pressures. Time: 34 minutes ago

item.title: Vishal Mega Mart Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Weak Price Action
item.description: Vishal Mega Mart Ltd (VMM) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, rising by 28.97% to 1,585 contracts from the previous 1,229. This increase comes amid a sustained decline in the stock price, which has underperformed its sector and broader market indices over the past week, signalling a complex interplay of market positioning and investor sentiment. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Kaynes Technology India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Momentum
item.description: Kaynes Technology India Ltd, a mid-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, witnessed a notable 10.04% surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment on 1 April 2026, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning despite the stock trading near its 52-week low and underperforming key moving averages. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Hyundai Motor India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Price Action
item.description: Hyundai Motor India Ltd has witnessed a significant 14.02% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s recent downward price trend. This surge in open interest, coupled with rising volumes and shifting investor positioning, offers a nuanced view of market sentiment towards the large-cap automobile player amid a challenging sector environment. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Market Volatility
item.description: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd (NAM-INDIA) has witnessed a significant 36.2% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and evolving investor positioning. Despite a challenging day marked by a 3.85% decline in the stock price, the spike in open interest and volume patterns suggest nuanced directional bets amid broader sector weakness. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Amber Enterprises India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Price Action
item.description: Amber Enterprises India Ltd witnessed a significant 21.11% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment on 2 April 2026, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock’s underperformance. This spike in open interest, coupled with falling prices and volume patterns, suggests a complex shift in market positioning that investors should carefully analyse. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Regaal Resources Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.64% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 67.49, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Regaal Resources Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.64% on 2 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Cochin Shipyard Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bearish Market Sentiment
item.description: Cochin Shipyard Ltd (COCHINSHIP) has witnessed a significant 20.6% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this spike, the stock has faced downward pressure, reflecting a complex interplay of bearish sentiment and speculative bets ahead of upcoming market catalysts. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Power Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Adani Power Ltd has witnessed a notable 16.9% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity despite the stock underperforming its sector and broader indices. This surge in open interest, coupled with rising delivery volumes and mixed price action, suggests evolving investor positioning and potential directional bets in the power sector. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Page Industries Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: Page Industries Ltd (PAGEIND), a prominent player in the Garments & Apparels sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. This development comes alongside a robust price performance that outpaced both its sector and the broader market indices, reflecting renewed bullish sentiment among traders and investors alike. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd Surges on Heavy Value Trading Amid Sector Weakness
item.description: Ola Electric Mobility Ltd (symbol: OLAELEC) emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 2 April 2026, registering a remarkable ₹624.23 crore in turnover on a staggering volume of over 23 crore shares. Despite a strong intraday rally, the stock remains under pressure from a strong sell rating, reflecting a complex interplay of high volatility and institutional caution in the automobile sector. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Godfrey Phillips India Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Weak Price Action
item.description: Godfrey Phillips India Ltd. has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite the stock trading near its 52-week low and underperforming its sector, the sharp increase in open interest and volume suggests evolving directional bets among traders. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: R M Drip & Sprinklers Systems Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.98% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 43.21, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. R M Drip & Sprinklers Systems Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.98% on 2 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Halder Venture Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 255.0, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Halder Venture Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 2 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: 3,620 Call Contracts on Page Industries Ltd Signal Near-Term Upside Ahead of April Expiry
item.description: 3,620 call contracts at the Rs 34,000 strike traded on Page Industries Ltd on 2 Apr 2026, with the stock closing at Rs 33,915 after a 3.60% gain. This near-the-money activity ahead of the 28 Apr expiry suggests a focused short-term directional bet in the derivatives market, aligning closely with the recent positive momentum in the cash market. Time: 35 minutes ago
